prompt: Create a high-quality cinematic double-exposure paper-tear collage portrait of a beautiful young South Asian woman with long silky dark brown hair, wearing an elegant deep teal embroidered traditional salwar kameez with gold detailing, matching trousers, and a sheer teal dupatta. The image is a vertical 3:4 composition split by one jagged torn-paper horizontal edge running diagonally across the middle. The upper half shows a large ethereal close-up portrait filling the frame from shoulders upward, with the woman turned slightly downward and to the side, soft natural skin tone, glossy center-parted hair, ornate gold jhumka earrings, and a softly blurred neutral city background. The lower half shows the same woman as a full-body figure walking toward the camera in the center of a wet urban street at golden hour, with blurred cars, glowing headlights, misty buildings, and warm sunlight in the distance. Preserve realistic proportions, cinematic depth of field, moody warm lighting, reflective asphalt, subtle bokeh, and a refined fashion editorial look. Include exactly 2 depictions of the woman: 1 oversized close-up portrait in the upper torn-paper layer and 1 full-body walking figure in the lower street scene. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no cartoon styling.
